ApiInvalidRequestError.comment: Thrown when an API request is malformed or contains invalid parameters.

ApiMethodNotAllowedError.message: The API method is not allowed.
ApiMethodNotAllowedError.comment: Thrown when the API endpoint does not support the requested HTTP method.

ApiNotFoundError.comment: Thrown when the requested API endpoint or resource does not exist.

ApiRateLimitError.comment: Thrown when the API request rate limit has been exceeded.

ApiVersionError.comment: Thrown when the requested API version is invalid or unsupported.

AssertionError.comment: Thrown when an assertion in the code fails.

AuthForbiddenError.comment: Thrown when access to a resource is explicitly forbidden.

AuthPermissionError.comment: Thrown when the authenticated user lacks the required permissions.

AuthSessionExpiredError.comment: Thrown when an authentication session has expired and re-authentication is required.

AuthUnauthorizedError.comment: Thrown when authentication is required but missing or invalid.

DatabaseConnectionError.comment: Thrown when a connection to the database cannot be established.

DatabaseDisconnectionError.comment: Thrown when an existing database connection is unexpectedly lost.

DatabaseQueryError.comment: Thrown when a database query fails during execution.

DatabaseTimeoutError.comment: Thrown when a database operation exceeds the allowed time limit.

DirectoryAlreadyExistsError.comment: Thrown when attempting to create a directory that already exists.

DirectoryCreationError.comment: Thrown when a directory cannot be created due to an operation failure.

DirectoryDeletionError.comment: Thrown when deleting a directory fails during the operation.

DirectoryEmptyError.comment: Thrown when a directory is unexpectedly empty.

DirectoryExpectedError.comment: Thrown when a directory was expected but not provided or found.

DirectoryNotEmptyError.comment: Thrown when a directory is expected to be empty but contains files or subdirectories.

DirectoryNotFoundError.comment: Thrown when a requested directory cannot be found.

DirectoryPathFormatError.comment: Thrown when a directory path does not match the expected format.

DirectoryPermissionError.comment: Thrown when the current process lacks permission to access or modify a directory.

FileAlreadyExistsError.comment: Thrown when attempting to create a file that already exists.

FileCreationError.comment: Thrown when a file cannot be created due to an operation failure.

FileCopyError.comment: Thrown when copying a file fails during the operation.

FileDeletionError.comment: Thrown when deleting a file fails during the operation.

FileEmptyError.comment: Thrown when a file is unexpectedly empty.

FileExpectedError.comment: Thrown when a file was expected but not provided or found.

FileExtensionError.comment: Thrown when a file has an invalid or unsupported extension or format.

FileNotFoundError.comment: Thrown when a requested file cannot be found.

FilePathFormatError.comment: Thrown when a file path does not match the expected format.

FilePermissionError.comment: Thrown when the current process lacks permission to access or modify a file.

FileUnreadableError.comment: Thrown when a file cannot be read during an operation.

FileUnwritableError.comment: Thrown when a file cannot be written during an operation.

FileSystemLimitError.comment: Thrown when a file operation fails due to system-level limitations such as disk quotas or file system constraints.

LinkNotFoundError.comment: Thrown when a requested link or symbolic link cannot be found.

NetworkAddressInUseError.message: Network address is already in use.
NetworkAddressInUseError.comment: Thrown when a network address is already in use by another process.

NetworkConnectionError.comment: Thrown when a network connection cannot be established or fails unexpectedly.

NetworkHostUnreachableError.comment: Thrown when the target host cannot be reached over the network.

NetworkPortInUseError.message: Network port is already in use.
NetworkPortInUseError.comment: Thrown when a network port is already in use by another process.

ObjectPropertyMissingError.comment: Thrown when an expected property is missing from an object.

PathTooLongError.comment: Thrown when a file system path exceeds the maximum allowed length.

ServerConnectionError.comment: Thrown when the server fails to establish or maintain a required connection.

ServerInputOutputError.comment: Thrown when a server-side input/output operation fails.

ServerInternalError.comment: Thrown when an unexpected internal server error occurs.

ServerTimeoutError.comment: Thrown when a server operation exceeds the allowed time limit.

SymlinkLoopError.comment: Thrown when a symbolic link loop is detected during path resolution.

SystemCriticalCpuUsageError.comment: Thrown when CPU usage reaches a critical level that may affect system stability.

SystemOutOfMemoryError.comment: Thrown when the system runs out of available memory.

SystemOutOfDiskSpaceError.message: System ran out of disk space.
SystemOutOfDiskSpaceError.comment: Thrown when the system runs out of disk space.

SystemReadOnlyError.comment: Thrown when the system is in read-only mode and write operations are not allowed.

SystemTooManyFilesOpenError.comment: Thrown when the system exceeds the limit for simultaneously open files.

TokenExpiredError.comment: Thrown when an authentication token has expired and is no longer valid.

TokenInvalidError.comment: Thrown when an authentication token is invalid or malformed.

TokenMissingError.comment: Thrown when an expected authentication token is missing from the request.

UnknownError.comment: Thrown when an unknown or unexpected error occurs.

ValidationMissingFieldError.comment: Thrown when a required field is missing during validation.

ValidationInvalidFormatError.comment: Thrown when a value does not match the expected format during validation.

ValidationConstraintViolationError.comment: Thrown when a value violates a validation constraint (e.g., range, pattern, or rule).

ValueContainsWhitespaceError.comment: Thrown when a value contains unexpected whitespace.

ValueDataTypeError.message: Value has the wrong data type.
ValueDataTypeError.comment: Thrown when a value is of the wrong data type.

ValueEmptyOrZeroError.comment: Thrown when a value is empty or zero, but a valid value is required.

ValueFormatError.comment: Thrown when a value does not match the expected format.

ValueOutOfRangeError.comment: Thrown when a value is outside the allowed range.

ValueUnexpectedError.comment: Used to represent unexpected errors related to invalid or improperly formatted values.
